descriptionTemplate: Treated as "Strike". Choose any 1 card from {Ultra Space} and add it to your hand, reducing its Arithmetica Cost by 2. Randomly deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times}, and gain [Power:Arg3] Temporary {STR}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Treated as "Strike". Choose any 1 card from {Ultra Space} and add it to your hand, reducing its Arithmetica Cost by 2. Randomly deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times}, and gain [Power:Arg3] Temporary {STR}. {Aftershock}: Shuffle 1 {Insight} into the Draw Pile.
